floor_history.headline: fable-blitz recon: (double) cast is inert-likely - target asm has ZERO float/cop1 instructions, the ==2 compare is a plain bne v1,v0 with v0=2 from the prior branch's delay slot; introducing commit 8d

frontier.hypothesis: UNMEASURED: delete the (double) cast -> if (D_800A3817 == 2) at src/code6cac.c:1897; expect sandbox 0 (byte-identical) since the cast is folded before RTL generation
frontier.mechanism: fold-const.c folds (double)(int_cmp) != 0.0 to int_cmp != 0 to the bare EQ compare; no float RTL is ever generated (target confirms: zero cop1 ops), so removal cannot change the insn stream
frontier.next_probe: edit src/code6cac.c:1897 to remove the cast, run sandbox cpu_get_move_pattern_table_number --disable all; expect 0; then verify-oracle (no rules to retire per commit 8d342343 being a pure-C match)

frontier.hypothesis: UNMEASURED contingency: if removal shifts bytes (cast was compensating for something unstated), diff the sandbox output around 0x8001ee50-0x8001eea0 - most likely suspects are branch sense on the ==2 compare or the li v0,2 delay-slot fill
frontier.mechanism: do_jump NE-of-EQ wrapping vs bare EQ could in principle alter the jump polarity; reorg.c delay-slot fill depends on the constant-materialization insn being target-block-leading
frontier.next_probe: objdump the sandbox .o, diff vs target tail, and match the divergence to a technique-index slug (switch-vs-ifchain-branch-sense if polarity, loop-note/scheduling if delay-slot)

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Line 1898: `if ((double)(D_800A3817 == 2))` — the `(double)` cast is a semantically-inert codegen trick (optimizer folds it away: target asm shows plain `bne $v1,$v0` with no float instructions). Fails tests 1/2/3/5. Worker must redo the last `if` arm without the cast.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)
